description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, arms extended horizontally to the sides. He is dressed in a short-sleeved collared shirt tucked into straight-cut pants, secured with a belt at the waist. The figure wears sturdy, ankle-high boots with a thick sole, suggesting practical or work-related footwear. His head is bald, and his facial features are neutral, with no visible accessories or carried items. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the overall appearance is that of a casually dressed urban pedestrian. The surface of the figure is matte, with minimal textural detail, and the proportions are realistic for an adult male.
description: A bald adult male in a short-sleeved shirt, pants, and boots, arms outstretched, with a stocky build and casual urban attire.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the bald head, outstretched arms, and the full width of the shirt and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm extended forward, and the straight leg line with visible boot details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, broad shoulders, belt, and the backs of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, arm, and the contour of the body and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved collared shirt, straight-cut pants, belt
